creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Loic,

the man page you sent the patch for is part of the cdk distribution. IMHO,
instead of adding the patch to the FreeBSD port, it should be sent to the
upstream maintainer (see http://invisible-island.net/cdk/) to be
reviewed/incorporated there.

Please let me know if there are reasons to add it to the FreeBSD port only
or if this PR should be closed.

Regards,
Stefan
